title: PermissionSetProvisioningStatus
description: A structure that is used to provide the status of the provisioning operation for a specified permission set.

allOf.description: The status of the permission set provisioning process.
The identifier for tracking the request operation that is generated by the universally unique identifier (UUID) workflow.
The identifier of the AWS account from which to list the assignments.
The ARN of the permission set that is being provisioned. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.
The message that contains an error or exception in case of an operation failure.
The date that the permission set was created.
